underlying_goal: Write and structure technical documentation for a SIA protocol alarm receiver project, covering parse, validate, reader, and message modules
friction_detail: Claude incorrectly claimed SUMMARY.md had wrong filenames when it was fine, and initially described Raw/Payload fields backwards until user corrected it; user also interrupted to change mind about isHex link vs section.
brief_summary: User wanted to write and refine technical documentation for their SIA protocol parser/validator project; they achieved comprehensive docs across multiple files through iterative collaboration with Claude handling edits, drafting, and structural suggestions.
